forewarning.mac_body: macOS will ask: Allow BlackHole in System Settings → Privacy & Security. This is one click. vibemix can't grant it for you; it's the only step Apple keeps user-driven.
forewarning.win_body: Windows will ask permission to install an audio driver. Click Yes. The driver is signed by VB-Audio; vibemix verifies the SHA-256 before running it.

driver_fetch.heading: Setting up audio
driver_fetch.fallback_body: Run this in Terminal, then click retry: brew install blackhole-2ch

format_check.heading: Format check
format_check.success: BlackHole is set to 48 kHz · ready
format_check.fail: BlackHole is at {measured_khz} kHz. vibemix needs 48 kHz.

uninstall.title: Uninstall vibemix
uninstall.body: Your recordings and debriefs will stay on your machine. The app, audio routing, and caches will be removed.
uninstall.clean_body: Removes ~{mb} MB of recordings, debriefs, ghost calibration. This can't be undone.
